title: Growth Curve Analysis of Bacteria with Bacteriophage
author: Sebastiaan Kuiper
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.77jhrkn

steps.title: Media and bacteriophage stock solutions
steps.instruction: Media and bacteriophage stock solutions : 1L Luria-Bertani (LB) media (with antibiotics) Desired Bacteriophage stock solution in LB media (with known Plaque Forming Units (PFU) ml -1 )

steps.title: Fill in plate reader protocol as follows
steps.instruction: Fill in plate reader protocol as follows: Set temperature: 37°C preheat before moving to next step Start kinetics: Runtime 15:00:00 (HH:MM:SS), Interval 0:04:00 Shake: medium, 0:30 (MM:SS) Read: Absorbance Endpoint, Full Plate Wavelengths: 600 Read Speed: Normal, Delay: 100 msec End kinetics

steps.title: Prepare overnight cultures of desired samples (with associated antibiotics)
steps.instruction: Prepare overnight cultures of desired samples (with associated antibiotics).

steps.title: Measure OD600 of overnight cultures and...
steps.instruction: Measure OD600 of overnight cultures and dilute cultures to an OD600 of 0.02

steps.title: Load 180 µL, of diluted overnight...
steps.instruction: Load 180 µL, of diluted overnight culture into a 96-well plate, flat bottom, tissue culture treated, black wall with clear bottom Fisher Scientific Catalog #3904 Include a serie of LB (without bacteria) as a control and as zero point for the OD600 measurements!

steps.title: Start plate reader protocol go to...
steps.instruction: Start plate reader protocol go to step #2 and let the bacteria grow to an OD600 of 0.11.

steps.title: Prepare Bacteriophage PFU dilutions (with associated...
steps.instruction: Prepare Bacteriophage PFU dilutions (with associated antibiotics) for; MOI 10 1 : 4.0 x 10 10 PFU ml -1 MOI 10 0 : 4.0 x 10 9 PFU ml -1 MOI 10 -1 : 8.0 x 10 8 PFU ml -1 MOI 10 -2 : 8.0 x 10 7 PFU ml -1 MOI 10 -3 : 8.0 x 10 6 PFU ml -1 An OD600 of 0.10 correlates to 8.0 x 10 8 cells per ml. The above concentrations are required when 20 μl of bacteriophage dilution is added into 180 μl of cell culture with an OD600 of 0.11 (1:10 dilution).

steps.title: At the moment an OD600 of 0
steps.instruction: At the moment an OD600 of 0.11 is reached, the plate reader must be stopped and 20 µL, of bacteriophage dilution* must be added to a final volume of 200 µL to both the samples and the LB controls. * include as a control, a serie without bacteriophages and only LB media (with antibiotics)

steps.title: Restart the plate reader protocol and...
steps.instruction: Restart the plate reader protocol and measure over 15 hours the growth of the samples.
